properties.displayName: Enforce Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS) Secrets Store Container Storage Interface (CSI) Driver
properties.description: Audits or denies Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS) clusters that do not have the Secrets Store CSI Driver add-on enabled.
